UpdateBlbHttpsListener.blbId: The identifier of the associated LoadBalancer
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.listenerPort: The listener port to update, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.backendPort: The listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports two modes: "RoundRobin" (weighted round-robin) and "LeastConnection" (least connections)
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.keepSession: Whether to enable session persistence, which routes requests from the same client to the same backend server; disabled by default
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionType: Cookie handling method for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled; supports "insert" or "rewrite", defaults to "insert"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionDuration: Cookie validity duration for session persistence (in seconds), valid only when session persistence is enabled; defaults to 3600s, must be an integer between 1 and 15552000
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionCookieName: The cookie name to override for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled and keepSessionType is "rewrite"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.xForwardFor: Whether to enable retrieval of the real client IP; when enabled, the backend server can obtain the client's real address via the X-Forwarded-For HTTP header; disabled by default
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.xForwardedProto: Forwards the protocol used by the listener to the backend server via the x-forwarded-proto HTTP header
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.additionalAttributes.gzipJson: Whether to enable gzip JSON compression; string type, value is "on" or "off"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckPort: Health check port, defaults to backendPort
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckURI: Health check URI, defaults to "/"; takes effect when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout (in seconds), defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval (in seconds), defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold: the number of consecutive health check failures after which the backend server is disabled; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold: the number of consecutive health check successes after which the backend server is re-enabled; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered healthy during health checks; supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g. "http_1xx\|http_2xx"; defaults to "http_2xx\|http_3xx"; takes effect when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckHost: The host field in the header of layer-7 health check requests, e.g. "localhost"; defaults to ""; takes effect when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.serverTimeout: Maximum timeout for backend servers (in seconds), defaults to 30s, must be an integer between 1 and 3600
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.certIds: The certificate chain to be loaded by the listener; currently only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.additionalCertDomains.Host: Certificate domain name; if the certificate product type is a wildcard domain, wildcard domains and their subdomains are also supported
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.encryptionType: Encryption option; supports: tls_cipher_policy_default / tls_cipher_policy_1_1 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure / userDefind; see the corresponding encryption protocols and cipher suites at: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption)
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.encryptionProtocols: When encryptionType is "userDefind", a list of protocol types composed of combinations of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
UpdateBlbHttpsListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites; see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption); multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
